overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through an industrial storage facility. The character moves through narrow corridors between metal shelving units before approaching a doorway where another character stands. The environment features artificial lighting and a desaturated, industrial aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial storage corridor with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow storage corridor between tall metal shelving units

entered.detail: tall industrial metal shelving with various containers and boxes
white gas canisters stacked on the floor against the left wall
large rectangular storage container with metallic finish
fluorescent tube light hanging from the ceiling
coiled black cables lying on the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial storage corridor flanked by tall metal shelving units. The environment is dimly lit by overhead fluorescent lights, with various storage containers, gas canisters, and coiled cables visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: doorway transition to secondary storage room

events.description: character approaches and walks through a doorway into an adjacent storage room

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into the adjacent room where another person is standing

notable_agents.action: standing near the doorway, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: metal doorway frame leading to the adjacent storage room
large metal pipes running along the left wall of the new room

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a doorway at the end of the corridor and enters an adjacent storage room. Inside, metal pipes run along the left wall where another character stands waiting. The shelving units that were on the left are now visible on the right side of the new room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor that opens into a wider storage room. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage flanked by tall metal shelving units, passing by scattered gas canisters and coiled cables under flickering fluorescent lights. As the character reaches the end of the hallway, the camera glides through a doorway and enters an adjacent space. The scene then shifts to reveal a new layout where metal pipes line the left wall and the shelving units transition to the right side of the room. Finally, the movement settles as the character approaches another figure standing waiting within the industrial interior.
